title: Artifact Manifest v1
description: Minimal manifest schema for ChatgptREST artifact governance. Phase 0: 5 required fields. Phase 1 optional extensions are defined but not required.

artifact_id.description: Globally unique identifier. For job artifacts: job_id. For KB artifacts: registry artifact_id. For review artifacts: stable digest.

canonical_path.description: Primary file or directory path relative to repo root. For job dirs: 'artifacts/jobs/<job_id>'. For KB: 'knowledge/<bucket>/<filename>'.

schema_version.description: Schema version. Must be 'artifact-manifest-v1' for this version.

source_system.description: Optional. System that produced this artifact (e.g., 'advisor', 'finbot', 'maint_daemon').

producer.description: Optional. Agent or human that created this artifact.

retention_class.description: Optional. Retention tier. Defaults to 'hot' on creation.

related_paths.description: Optional. Related artifact paths for cross-reference.

content_hash.description: Optional. SHA-256 hash of primary content for integrity verification.
